Our Story

Where Trust
Meets Technology.

Founded in February 2024 by Erick Cruz alongside Certiverse CEO Ruben Garcia, Five Acts Services Corp. began as a tight-knit team in Manila, Philippines, managing localized remote proctoring sessions. Recognizing our potential, Chicago-based testing innovator Certiverse tapped us as their official Asia-Pacific (APAC) Proctoring Regional Headquarters, anchoring their Remote Online Proctoring Certification Exams in the region.

Driven by our success in high-stakes exam security, Five Acts has grown into a robust operation delivering a comprehensive suite of premium remote business solutions for companies worldwide.

Security-First Culture
Every session is treated as high-stakes. Our proctors are trained to uphold the highest standards of exam integrity.
24/7 Operational Readiness
Remote testing doesn't follow business hours. Our team is built to support sessions across time zones, around the clock.
Candidate-Centered Approach
We prioritize a calm, professional experience for test-takers — making sure technical issues never get in the way of a fair exam.
Get In Touch

Whether you're looking for online proctoring, hybrid monitoring, virtual assistance, BPO services, or any remote business solution — our team is here to help you find the right fit.
